raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van Service in Lewes

Looking for a low-cost, efficient moving service for smaller moves? Look no further! Mark Ratcliffe offers man with a van and more...

How can we help you today?

Professional Man and Van in Lewes

‍

Experienced Removals - Mark Ratcliffe

We are a moving company in Lewes who offer more than just large, comprehensive moves. We offer a man with a van hire service which is perfect for domestic customers needing assistance with smaller moves like student accommodation or flat moves. Also we work with commercial clients - our man and van service is suitable for office moves. We understand that every move is different so we work flexibly and around your schedule. We are available 7 days a week and there's NO extra charge for weekends.

Great Service at Great Prices

At Mark Ratcliffe, we are committed to providing reliable and professional service at an affordable price. Unlike other removal companies, we can offer qualified staff members but still keeping prices affordable. We are renowned within the East Sussex area for providing a man with a van service which is sophisticated and thorough, providing suitable safety equipment to keep your belongings secure during transit for example van tie rails, furniture covers, loading ramps and sack trucks. Your designated removals man will be familiar with the Lewes area and therefore your belongs are sure to reach your destination quickly and not get held up by any disruptions.

Man and Van Lewes Rates

To make things simple we offer two different pricing options: 

  • ‍Man with a Van and working driver - £50 per hour
  • ‍Man with a Van and driver only - £70 per hour (you load and unload the van)

All of the prices above are inclusive of vat and fuel (within a local area) and there is no additional charges for weekend moving.

More Than Just a Removals Company

As part of our fully comprehensive service, Mark Ratcliffe offer additional, useful services. We offer a packing and unpacking service - our staff are fully trained to handle delicate materials and pack efficiently. If you are packing yourself, we offer flat pack moving boxes and other high quality packing supplies at great prices which can be collected from our shop. We offer self-storage units, perfect for when you need to store items in between moves. The large, secure, clean self storage rooms are available to rent at just £30 (plus VAT) per week and are fantastic value for money. They are available with easy access for loading and unloading.

Contact Us Today

For a free, no obligation quote please contact our friendly team today on 01323 848 008 or fill out the online form by clicking the button at the top of this page.
